title: Outside the Law
writer: Gardner Bradford, Tod Browning, Lucien Hubbard
actors: Priscilla Dean, Wheeler Oakman, Lon Chaney
plot: In this early collaboration with director Tod Browning (Dracula, Freaks), Chaney delivers a dual performance of dramatic intensity, starring as Ah Wing, a kind-hearted student of Confucian philosophy, and Black Mike Sylva, a murde...
